description: Cross-cutting V1 contract, documentation guardrails, and rollout framing for progressive Pibo debug telemetry.

userStories.title: Record V1 implementation decisions for telemetry
userStories.description: As an engineering lead, I want the open telemetry design decisions resolved in documentation so that Ralph iterations can implement a consistent V1 scope.
acceptanceCriteria: Update the observability telemetry PRD README or change docs with the authoritative V1 scope matrix: pibo.sqlite storage, session/event bidirectional links, summary-only preview default, provider/profile-aware stale thresholds, CLI-only V1 scope, incident retention class, default-on telemetry, and best-effort writes
Mark unresolved items as TBD only where implementation truly cannot proceed without user input
Document the recommended Ralph execution order and cross-PRD dependencies
Do not change runtime behavior in this story
userStories.notes: Run before implementation PRDs; documentation/contract only. Completed in docs batch on 2026-05-16; validated with npm run typecheck in Docker worker.

userStories.title: Add observability telemetry capability documentation
userStories.description: As a maintainer, I want a capability spec for runtime observability telemetry so that the data model and CLI contract are discoverable outside the change folder.
acceptanceCriteria: Add or update a capability document under docs/specs/capabilities for runtime observability telemetry

Document summary-first telemetry, correlation ids, runtime phases, provider diagnostics, tool-call progress, storage-volume control, retention classes, stale detection threshold sources, preview-disabled behavior, and non-goals
Link the capability document from the change PRD README or related docs
userStories.notes: Completed in docs batch on 2026-05-16; validated with npm run typecheck in Docker worker.

userStories.title: Update Debug CLI capability docs for telemetry branch
userStories.description: As a debug CLI user, I want the existing debug CLI docs to mention the telemetry branch so that I can discover the new workflow from the normal debug docs.
acceptanceCriteria: Update docs/specs/capabilities/debug-cli.md with the pibo debug telemetry branch and summary-first behavior
Document the intended command discovery flow from session to turn to provider/tool
State that telemetry commands are read-oriented except explicit prune apply
userStories.notes: Completed in docs batch on 2026-05-16; validated with npm run typecheck in Docker worker.

userStories.title: Add observability rollout checklist
userStories.description: As an operator, I want a rollout checklist so that telemetry can be enabled without flooding context or duplicating large stored content.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a rollout checklist to the PRD docs or a dedicated telemetry rollout doc

Checklist covers typecheck, debug CLI tests, bounded-output/storage tests, synthetic partial-tool-call fixture, stats/prune dry-run verification, stale threshold-source verification, and preview-unavailable behavior
Checklist explicitly states that automatic provider timeout recovery is out of scope for this feature
userStories.notes: Completed in docs batch on 2026-05-16; validated with npm run typecheck in Docker worker.
